changes.summary: User-content retention reduced from 90 to 30 days
changes.before: User content is retained for ninety (90) days after account deletion.
changes.after: User content is retained for thirty (30) days after account deletion.

citations.quote: User content is retained for thirty (30) days after account deletion.

changes.summary: Team plan per-seat rises from $16 to $19 (+18.75%)

citations.quote: Team plan: $19 per user / month, billed annually.

recommendation.copy: Open renewal conversation; cite §7.2 retention shortfall as material change.

changes.before: Sub-processors list does not include TextRecognize Ltd.
changes.after: Sub-processors list now includes TextRecognize Ltd, processing OCR text for KYC document validation.

citations.quote: TextRecognize Ltd — India — OCR text extraction for identity document validation.

recommendation.copy: Notify Privacy and DPO; assess transfer mechanism for non-adequate jurisdiction.
